meaning: n.(常伴有文娱节目的)夏威夷式宴会,[烹调]卢奥(用嫩芋叶和章鱼或鸡加椰子酱烹制成的一种菜)
examples: You can try dancing the hula and taking part in an authentic luau (feast).
Later a Hawaiian I met on my first night in Honolulu invites me to a luau.
Later, a Hawaiian I met on my first night in Honolulu invites me to a luau.
After the winners were chosen, the Chicken Teriyaki Luau Bowl and Mexican Mitt-Loaf Bowl went on sale.
On VRBO since 2010, the property is more homespun luau than generic Margaritaville, with rooms blending contemporary furnishings with native artwork.
